ars_caelum.ritual_desc.ritual_conjure_is.original: Creates an island of Blazing Archwoods. Converts the biome to Archwood Forest. Requires a full jar of Source to begin. NOTE: This ritual should be performed at least 32 blocks from any other block.
Creates an island of Cascading Archwoods. Converts the biome to Warm Ocean. Requires a full jar of Source to begin. NOTE: This ritual should be performed at least 32 blocks from any other block.

Creates an island of Flourishing Archwoods. Converts the biome to Mangrove Swamp. Requires a full jar of Source to begin. NOTE: This ritual should be performed at least 32 blocks from any other block.
Creates an island in the shape of a Beehive. Requires a full jar of Source to begin. NOTE: This ritual should be performed at least 32 blocks from any other block.
Creates an island of Flashing Archwoods. Converts the biome to Deep Dark. Requires a full jar of Source to begin. NOTE: This ritual should be performed at least 32 blocks from any other block.
Creates a Lush Garden Island capable of summoning animals. NOTE: This ritual should be performed at least 32 blocks from any other block.

Creates an island of Vexing Archwoods and a Weeping Well. Converts the biome to Mushroom Island. Requires a full jar of Source to begin. NOTE: This ritual should be performed at least 32 blocks from any other block.
Conjures a small island suitable for building on.
